name: Initial ASCII banner renderer
ANSI colors and rainbow helper
diff:
===================================================================
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/playground/colors.js
@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
+/**
+ * ANSI color helpers for the playground.
+ *
+ * Kept dependency-free so the playground stays a self-contained toy.
+ */
+
+/** @type {Record<string, string>} */
+const fg_codes = {
+	red: '\x1b[31m',
+	green: '\x1b[32m',
+	yellow: '\x1b[33m',
+	blue: '\x1b[34m',
+	magenta: '\x1b[35m',
+	cyan: '\x1b[36m',
+	white: '\x1b[37m',
+};
+
+const RESET = '\x1b[0m';
+const BOLD = '\x1b[1m';
+
+/** @typedef {keyof typeof fg_codes} Color */
+
+/**
+ * Wrap `text` in ANSI escape codes for the given color.
+ *
+ * @param {string} text
+ * @param {Color} color
+ * @param {{ bold?: boolean }} [options]
+ * @returns {string}
+ */
+export function colorize(text, color, options = {}) {
+	const code = fg_codes[color];
+	if (!code) return text;
+	const prefix = options.bold ? code + BOLD : code;
+	return prefix + text + RESET;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Color each row of a multi-line string with a rotating rainbow palette.
+ *
+ * @param {string} text - multi-line input.
+ * @returns {string}
+ */
+export function rainbow(text) {
+	/** @type {Color[]} */
+	const palette = ['red', 'yellow', 'green', 'cyan', 'blue', 'magenta'];
+	return text
+		.split('\n')
+		.map((row, i) => colorize(row, palette[i % palette.length], { bold: true }))
+		.join('\n');
+}

name: Animation primitives and marquee
Demo CLI entry point
